calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (854 46th Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Geoffrey Adams for Co-Administrators.

The sale was confirmed at $667,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
